column1: # f-tank partition table (4 MB flash) — "Basic" SKU (cost-optimized)
# Dual OTA app slots enable signed OTA with rollback (FR-38
# 4 MB = 0x400000. Each app slot is 0x1A0000 (1664 KB) and must hold the FULL
# image. No cloud TLS and no persistent logging on this SKU (compiled out)
# the image fits with headroom. Tiny filesystem only for NVS-adjacent needs.
